name: KIM ANKOR Oilfield Overseas Resources Development Special Asset Fund
summary: KIM ANKOR Oilfield Overseas Resources Development Special Asset Fund is a special asset fund managed by Korea Investment Management (KIM), focusing on overseas oilfield resource development, and aims to generate returns through investments in oil and gas exploration and production projects.

name: KIM Parallel Oilfield Overseas Resources Development Special Asset Fund 1
summary: KIM Parallel Oilfield Overseas Resources Development Special Asset Fund 1 is a special asset fund managed by Korea Investment Management (KIM), focusing on parallel oilfield resource development overseas, and aims to generate returns through investments in oil and gas exploration and production projects.
